bio.name: Philip Damian Samosir
bio.title: UI/UX Designer & Frontend Developer
bio.about: Informatics Engineering student with a strong interest in UI/UX Design, digital product development, and user-centered interface design. Experienced in creating web-based academic projects and designing modern user interfaces using design tools such as Figma, Canva and Visual Studio Code.

description: Assessed and improved the visuals of websites created by Diskominfo.
Participated in creating the Bakesbangpol website, focusing on the UI/UX layout and user experience flows.
Created modern tourism website layouts with responsive and immersive design concepts.
Engineered smooth navigation patterns for visitors exploring historical island landmarks.
Designed interface concepts and improved website usability for distributed nodes representation.
Iterated wireframes based on feedback to streamline developer-to-client interface workflows.

education.details: Focusing on Software Engineering, Human-Computer Interaction, and UI/UX design methodologies. Actively engaged in academic project builds.

activities.title: Diskominfo Internship Certificate
activities.description: Awarded for outstanding contribution to the visual layout design and quality testing of multiple regional public agency web applications.

activities.title: Distributed Communication Project Lead
activities.description: Led a small team to build and design a visual node monitoring platform for the Distributed Systems class.

projects.title: Penyengat Island Tourism Web Layout
projects.description: A modern and responsive web layout showcasing the historical and cultural tourist attractions of Penyengat Island. Designed to offer tourists a seamless mobile and desktop browsing experience.

projects.title: Bakesbangpol Web Portal
projects.description: Collaborated with Diskominfo to design the visual aesthetics and user experience architecture for the Bakesbangpol website, ensuring accessible government public services.

projects.title: Distributed Node Communication UI
projects.description: A dashboard designed to visualize server nodes and network traffic routing in real-time, focusing on clean information density and ease of network diagnostics.
